---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Deck Transfer
title: "[BUG]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Setup (please complete the following information):**
 - Windows version: [e.g. Windows 11 24H2]
 - Deck Transfer version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
 - Steam Deck model: [e.g. LCD, OLED]
 - Connection type: [e.g. direct ethernet, ethernet via USB-C hub]

**Transfer details (if applicable):**
 - File size: [e.g. 2.5 GB]
 - File type: [e.g. .iso, .zip, folder]
 - Destination path on Deck: [e.g. /home/deck/Transfers]
 - Error message (if any): [paste the exact error shown in the app]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
